sqlCatalog.outboxNew: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM message_outbox WHERE status='NEW' AND exchange_name NOT IN ('bad.exchange');
sqlCatalog.outboxFail: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM message_outbox WHERE status='FAIL' AND exchange_name NOT IN ('bad.exchange');
sqlCatalog.outboxFailRetrySum: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(retry_count),0) FROM message_outbox WHERE status='FAIL' AND exchange_name NOT IN ('bad.exchange');
sqlCatalog.shipTimeoutBacklog: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM order_ship_timeout_task WHERE status='PENDING' AND deadline_time<=NOW() AND (next_retry_time IS NULL OR next_retry_time<=NOW());
sqlCatalog.refundBacklog: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM order_refund_task WHERE status IN ('PENDING','FAILED') AND (next_retry_time IS NULL OR next_retry_time<=NOW());
sqlCatalog.shipReminderBacklog: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM order_ship_reminder_task WHERE status IN ('PENDING','FAILED') AND remind_time<=NOW();
sqlCatalog.taskHighRetryCount: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(cnt),0) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM order_ship_timeout_task WHERE retry_count>=3 UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM order_refund_task WHERE retry_count>=3 UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM order_ship_reminder_task WHERE retry_count>=3) t;
sqlCatalog.taskSevereRetryCount: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(cnt),0) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM order_ship_timeout_task WHERE retry_count>=5 UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM order_refund_task WHERE retry_count>=5 UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM order_ship_reminder_task WHERE retry_count>=5) t;

FLOW-B: query high retry samples by SQL
FLOW-C: if below threshold run compensation + rerun
